concepts.title: Data Types, Variables & Storage Classes
concepts.description: int/float/char/void, sizeof, signed/unsigned, auto/static/extern/register, const, typedef

concepts.title: Operators & Expressions
concepts.description: Arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise, ternary, comma, operator precedence, type promotion

concepts.title: Control Flow
concepts.description: if/else, switch, for/while/do-while, break/continue/goto, nested loops

concepts.title: Functions & Recursion
concepts.description: Declaration/definition, pass by value, variadic functions (stdarg.h), recursion, inline functions

concepts.title: Arrays & Strings
concepts.description: 1D/2D arrays, string.h functions, string manipulation, character arrays vs pointers, buffer overflow

concepts.title: Pointers Fundamentals
concepts.description: Declaration, dereferencing, NULL, pointer arithmetic, array-pointer duality, void pointers

concepts.title: Preprocessor & Compilation
concepts.description: #define, #include, #ifdef, macros with args, header guards, compilation stages, linking

concepts.title: Advanced Pointers
concepts.description: Double pointers, function pointers, callbacks, pointer to array, array of pointers, const pointers

concepts.title: Dynamic Memory Management
concepts.description: malloc/calloc/realloc/free, memory leaks, dangling pointers, heap vs stack, fragmentation

concepts.title: Structures, Unions & Enums
concepts.description: Struct definition, nested structs, unions, bit fields, padding/alignment, self-referential structs

concepts.title: File I/O (ANSI C)
concepts.description: fopen/fclose/fread/fwrite, fprintf/fscanf, fseek/ftell, binary vs text mode, EOF handling

concepts.title: Linked Lists
concepts.description: Singly/doubly linked, insertion/deletion, reversal, cycle detection, merge two sorted lists

concepts.title: Stacks, Queues & Trees
concepts.description: Array/linked-list implementation, infix-to-postfix, BFS/DFS, binary search tree operations

concepts.title: Sorting & Searching
concepts.description: Bubble/selection/insertion/merge/quick sort, binary search, time complexity, qsort() stdlib

concepts.title: Bitwise Operations & Tricks
concepts.description: Set/clear/toggle bits, bit masks, counting set bits, power of 2 check, swap without temp, bit fields

concepts.title: UNIX File I/O & Descriptors (APUE)
concepts.description: open/close/read/write, file descriptors, dup/dup2, fcntl, lseek, O_NONBLOCK

concepts.title: Files & Directories (APUE)
concepts.description: stat/fstat/lstat, permissions, chmod, inodes, hard/soft links, directory traversal, opendir/readdir

concepts.title: Process Control (APUE)
concepts.description: fork, exec family, wait/waitpid, zombie/orphan processes, process groups, sessions, daemon creation

concepts.title: Signals (APUE)
concepts.description: signal(), sigaction(), signal masks, SIGCHLD, async-signal-safe, kill/raise, alarm/pause

concepts.title: Inter-Process Communication (APUE)
concepts.description: Pipes, FIFOs, System V message queues, shared memory, semaphores, deadlock prevention

concepts.title: Threads & Synchronization (APUE)
concepts.description: pthread_create/join/detach, mutexes, condition variables, rwlocks, thread safety, race conditions

concepts.title: Socket Programming
concepts.description: TCP/UDP, socket/bind/listen/accept/connect, client-server model, select/poll, SO_REUSEADDR

concepts.title: Memory Internals & Debugging
concepts.description: Virtual memory, mmap, stack overflow, valgrind, gdb basics, address sanitizer, memory barriers

concepts.title: Embedded C & Hardware
concepts.description: volatile, memory-mapped I/O, ISRs, bit manipulation for registers, endianness, packed structs

concepts.title: C Standards & Best Practices
concepts.description: C99/C11 features, VLAs, _Generic, _Static_assert, restrict, undefined behavior, CERT C guidelines
